title.rendered: How AI Is Closing the Gap Between Marketing and Sales

content.rendered: In this episode of Marketing In The Now, David Reske sits down with Scott Logan — CMO at Amplify AI and a 20-year veteran of B2B revenue growth — to explore how AI is transforming the relationship between marketing and sales. Scott breaks down how marketing can go beyond top-of-funnel support to influence every stage of the sales cycle, from AI-tailored demos and hyper-personalized account briefings to scalable one-to-few ABM that was once only possible for a handful of key accounts. He also shares what skills CMOs should be hiring for, how to build a “no excuses” sales enablement environment, and why staying relentlessly curious about what’s new in AI is the only real competitive strategy heading into 2026.
